title: [MTR4]JR東日本 E217系|JR East E217 series
description: Resource pack that adds JR E217 series into Minecraft via Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
**Please download the latest version**
# Orerview
The E217 series (E217系) was a suburban electric multiple unit (EMU) train type operated by East Japan Railway Company (JR East) in the Kantō region of Japan from 1994 to 2025.

Introduced in 1994 to replace the 113 series EMUs running on the Sōbu Line (Rapid) and Yokosuka Line, the E217 series was the first outer-suburban train type in Japan to feature four pairs of doors per side per car. The basic design was developed from the 209 series commuter EMUs. It replaced all the Yokosuka Line 113 series trains by 1999. The trains were built jointly by Kawasaki Heavy Industries, Tokyu Car, and JR East (Niitsu and Ofuna factories).
## This pack includes
![E217 Yokosuka](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c1f49f296075bb51f3926803e44230ff7e74aa6e.png)
![E217 Shonan-Shinjuku](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8aced90dbe4c632fd8eccfdac4fcc029c4cde4c4.png)
### New motor sound for:
- E217 series
# My suggestion:
- Acceleration and deceleration: 2.5 - 2.9 km/h/s
- Average speed: 80 - 120 km/h
# Disclaimer
This resource pack is not associated with, and is not an official product of, East Japan Railway Company
**Tested on Minecraft 1.20.1 MTR 4.0.2 Hotfix Forge**
